question.label: Coasting this week
question.name: You said you're 'coasting a bit this week' — what's driving that?
question.description: Drills into the mild engagement dip she named to find out whether it's recovery, low challenge, or something else.

answer: Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.

assessment.note: She names low-challenge work and says she's 'not much stretching' right now, which is a strong engagement dip; also hints at a growth gap worth picking up next.

new_queue.label: Stretch gap
new_queue.name: You said 'not much stretching me right now' — what kind of work would feel stretching in a good way?

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Recognition gap
new_queue.name: What felt missing in how the refactor was recognised?

new_queue.label: Repeatable wins
new_queue.name: What should we make sure to repeat from that refactor on the next hard project?

new_queue.label: Mentoring trade-off
new_queue.name: What would you need to drop to make space for mentoring?

new_queue.label: Next-step close
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.
